note: These are REMAINING minimums for the 17 new primary selections N2-C must make — N2-A (miner-canary-dotnet-001) already occupies one repository-miner / ci-build / dotnet slot and is not re-selected or re-scored here. Full 18-case totals equal these targets plus N2-A's one contribution to each dimension it touches.
flexible_slot_policy: After the greedy quota-filling pass (quotas above sum to 15 ecosystem-dimension + 17 origin/family-dimension slots), any remaining primary slots up to total_new_primary_target are filled by walking the SAME deterministic ranked-and-tie-broken candidate order and taking the next eligible, not-yet-selected candidates in rank order — no manual reordering, no re-ranking, no fresh scoring pass.
